raw_consumer_statement: I lost my wallet and I did not know my GM card was in there at the time and it was used at various locations. XXXX sent me a new card that I place in my personal truck I was involved in a car accident and my truck was left at a shop for a month at that time someone took my card and used it without my permission I sent all the documents pertaining to this issue proof that I lost my wallet and had to get a new drivers license a tracker for my wallet and a new wallet I need your help with this issue I should not have to pay for these charges its causing me to lose sleep and also my credit dropped over XXXX points I need help resolving this please thank you.
